description: Label-gated automerge policy. Automerges minor and patch updates and labels every update by type so commercetools/renovate-action can gate merges on its 🤖 Risk: Low approval. Major updates are labelled for visibility but never automerged.

packageRules.description: Automerge minor updates; gated by the 🤖 Risk: Low approval from renovate-action.
Automerge patch updates; gated by the 🤖 Risk: Low approval from renovate-action.
Major updates are never automerged; labelled for visibility.
